## Audit Details

- **Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
- **Auditor**: [name]
- **Previous audit**: [link to QX-2026 audit]

## Checklist

### Phase 1 — Collect Evidence
- [ ] Code structure agent dispatched and results collected
- [ ] Testing & CI agent dispatched and results collected
- [ ] Process & docs agent dispatched and results collected
- [ ] External dependencies agent dispatched and results collected

### Phase 2 — Verify & Expand
- [ ] Claims verified against actual code
- [ ] High-impact leads expanded with deep agents

### Phase 3 — Extract Layers
- [ ] Layer 1: Concrete findings documented
- [ ] Layer 2: Recurring patterns identified
- [ ] Layer 3: Systemic causes analyzed

### Phase 4 — Write Artifacts
- [ ] GitHub issues filed for each actionable finding
- [ ] Synthesis appended to `docs/synthesis/v<next>.md`
- [ ] STANDARDS.md updated with new gaps
- [ ] ADRs created for design decisions made during audit

## Findings Summary

| # | Finding | Severity | Action |
|---|---------|----------|--------|
| 1 | | | |
| 2 | | | |
| 3 | | | |

## Gaps to Close (add to STANDARDS.md)

## Audit Complete
- [ ] All findings documented
- [ ] Automation improvements identified
- [ ] Results shared
